The '''Dancers' Pit''' was a room where the [[Entertainer|dancers]] living in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] would go to prepare to perform for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="Sleight of Hand" />

{{Loc-stub}}
